---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve the PEC App platform
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug, triage, priority-low
assignees: ''

---

## 1. Bug Description

Provide a high-fidelity description of the bug. What is the unexpected behavior you are seeing in the PEC App platform?

---

## 2. Reproduction Steps

1. Go to '...' (e.g., Attendance, Canteen, Dashboard)
2. Click on '....' (e.g., Mark Attendance, View Profile)
3. Scroll down to '....' (e.g., Roll-call list)
4. See error (e.g., "Something went wrong" or malformed text)

---

## 3. Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen according to the institutional functional specification.

---

## 4. Screenshots or 3D Topology Previews

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem. For 3D Map bugs, include a preview of the WebGL rendering.

---

## 5. Technical Environment

- Device: [e.g. iPhone6, Desktop Workstation]
- OS: [e.g. iOS8.1, Windows 11]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Safari]
- Version: [e.g. 22]

---

## 6. Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here, such as the relevant API endpoint or the Zod schema involved.

---

**PEC Technical Operations Group**
Standard: PEC-BUG-REPORT-2026
Status: ACTIVE
